2604.21375.title: VLAA-GUI: Knowing When to Stop, Recover, and Search, A Modular Framework for GUI Automation
2604.21375.paper_summary: Autonomous GUI agents face two fundamental challenges: early stopping, where agents prematurely declare success without verifiable evidence, and repetitive loops, where agents cycle through the same failing actions without recovery. We present VLAA-GUI, a modular GUI agentic framework built around three integrated components that guide the system on when to Stop, Recover, and Search. First, a mandatory Completeness Verifier enforces UI-observable success criteria and verification at every finish step -- with an agent-level verifier that cross-examines completion claims with decision rules, rejecting those lacking direct visual evidence. Second, a mandatory Loop Breaker provides multi-tier filtering: switching interaction mode after repeated failures, forcing strategy changes after persistent screen-state recurrence, and binding reflection signals to strategy shifts. Third, an on-demand Search Agent searches online for unfamiliar workflows by directly querying a capable LLM with search ability, returning results as plain text. We additionally integrate a Coding Agent for code-intensive actions and a Grounding Agent for precise action grounding, both invoked on demand when required. We evaluate VLAA-GUI across five top-tier backbones, including Opus 4.5, 4.6 and Gemini 3.1 Pro, on two benchmarks with Linux and Windows tasks, achieving top performance on both (77.5% on OSWorld and 61.0% on WindowsAgentArena). Notably, three of the five backbones surpass human performance (72.4%) on OSWorld in a single pass. Ablation studies show that all three proposed components consistently improve a strong backbone, while a weaker backbone benefits more from these tools when the step budget is sufficient. Further analysis also shows that the Loop Breaker nearly halves wasted steps for loop-prone models.
2604.21375.paper_summary_zh: 自主 GUI 代理面臨兩個基本挑戰：早期停止，代理在沒有可驗證證據的情況下過早宣告成功，以及重複循環，代理在無法恢復的情況下不斷重複相同的失敗行動。我們提出了 VLAA-GUI，一個模組化的 GUI 代理框架，圍繞三個整合的組件構建，指導系統何時停止、恢復和搜尋。首先，一個強制性的完整性驗證器在每個完成步驟強制執行 UI 可觀察的成功標準和驗證——並且有一個代理級別的驗證器交叉檢查完成聲明與決策規則，拒絕那些缺乏直接視覺證據的聲明。其次，一個強制性的循環中斷器提供多層過濾：在重複失敗後切換互動模式，在持續的螢幕狀態重現後強制策略變更，並將反思信號綁定到策略轉變。第三，一個按需搜尋代理通過直接查詢具有搜尋能力的 LLM 在線搜尋不熟悉的工作流程，並將結果以純文本形式返回。我們還整合了一個編碼代理用於代碼密集型行動，以及一個基礎代理用於精確的行動基礎，這兩者在需要時按需調用。我們在五個頂級骨幹上評估 VLAA-GUI，包括 Opus 4.5、4.6 和 Gemini 3.1 Pro，在兩個基準上進行 Linux 和 Windows 任務，達到兩者的最佳表現（OSWorld 上為 77.5% 和 WindowsAgentArena 上為 61.0%）。值得注意的是，五個骨幹中的三個在單次通過中超越了人類表現（72.4%）在 OSWorld 上。消融研究顯示，所有三個提議的組件持續改善一個強大的骨幹，而較弱的骨幹在步驟預算充足時從這些工具中受益更多。進一步分析還顯示，循環中斷器幾乎將循環易發模型的浪費步驟減半。
2604.21375.author: Qijun Han et.al.
2604.21375.authors: Qijun Han, Haoqin Tu, Zijun Wang, Haoyue Dai, Yiyang Zhou, Nancy Lau, Alvaro A. Cardenas, Yuhui Xu, Ran Xu, Caiming Xiong, Zeyu Zheng, Huaxiu Yao, Yuyin Zhou, Cihang Xie
